console.connected: Connected to the read API. {events} events recorded, {pending} awaiting your decision.
console.mostlyNoAi: Most of it was handled without AI reasoning:
console.hilPendingOne: {count} item needs your decision - escalated to a human by the risk gate.
console.hilPendingMany: {count} items need your decision - escalated to a human by the risk gate.
console.nothingPending: Nothing is awaiting your sign-off right now.

briefing.greeting: Good morning, {operator}. Everything's running normally. Here's what happened over {window}.
briefing.busyTitle: How busy things were - events handled every 5 minutes:
briefing.busyCaption: busiest around {peak} - about {count} events / 5 min at peak
briefing.tiersTitle: Most of it was handled by fixed rules - no AI needed:
briefing.autoNarration: It handled {auto} of {events} on its own. Nothing had to be undone. {shadow} new rules are being trialed safely - watching only, not acting yet.
briefing.hilOne: One thing needs your decision - they are above the risk level I act on by myself.
briefing.hilMany: {word} things need your decision - they are above the risk level I act on by myself.
briefing.openCard: open a card (1-{max}), or type a question
briefing.promptHintMock: keys are illustrative - this is a design mock
briefing.nothingSignoff: Nothing needs your sign-off right now. Everything is handled, and every change can be undone.
briefing.lookInto: Anything you want to look into? For example:
briefing.typeQuestionHint: I only look things up unless you ask me to act - and I'll confirm before anything changes

narrator.cardDetail: {title} ({actionType}). {why} Confidence: {basis} ({basisTech}). Safety: {safety} Approving opens a pull request - {who}
narrator.approveHint: (read-only) Approving opens a pull request; nothing changes until it is merged, and you cannot approve your own request.
narrator.explainHint: Pick a card number to see the reasoning behind it.
narrator.samplePayments: payments-api restarted after two out-of-memory events in the last hour (incident #1204). There is a pending proposal to raise its memory 512 MB -> 1 GB (card 1), 91% similar to incident #0847.
narrator.sampleSpend: Spending is flat versus last week in this synthetic dataset. One cost rule ('idle disk cleanup') is finishing a 30-day trial with 41/41 correct (card 3).
narrator.sampleRules: {shadow} rules are in trial (shadow mode) - they watch and log but do not act yet. One is ready to promote to live (card 3).
narrator.fallback: I match keywords like kpi / hil queue / recent audit, or a card number. Right now: {kpi}. Free-form natural language (including Korean) is answered by the LLM narrator - set FDAI_NARRATOR_* to enable it.

cmd.paused: Paused - the feed is frozen, events still count. Say 'resume' to continue.
cmd.overview: Overview - routing mix, throughput, outcomes, and top resources.
